    CreateSecret --> SetMetadata[Set Metadata<br/>name: cluster.name-secret<br/>labels: argocd secret type]

    SetStringData --> AddName[name: cluster.name]
    AddName --> AddServer[server: cluster.endpoint]
    AddServer --> AddConfig[config: JSON with<br/>awsAuthConfig<br/>tlsClientConfig]
    AddConfig --> Skip
    Skip --> Loop
    Loop -->|Done| End([Template Complete])

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class Values {
        +cluster[] clusters
        +string environment
        +role Role
    }
    class Cluster {
        +string name
        +string endpoint
        +string ca
        +string deployment
    }
    class Role {
        +string arn
    }
    class Secret {
        +string apiVersion
        +string kind
        +Metadata metadata
        +string type
        +StringData stringData
    }
    class Metadata {
        +string name
        +Labels labels
    }
    class Labels {
        +string argocd_secret_type
        +string environment
        +string deployment
    }
    class StringData {
        +string name
        +string server
        +string config
    }
    class Config {
        +AwsAuthConfig awsAuthConfig
        +TlsClientConfig tlsClientConfig
    }
    class AwsAuthConfig {
        +string clusterName
        +string roleARN
    }
    class TlsClientConfig {
        +bool insecure
        +string caData
    }
    Values "1" --> "*" Cluster
    Values "1" --> "1" Role
    Secret "1" --> "1" Metadata
    Secret "1" --> "1" StringData
    Metadata "1" --> "1" Labels
    StringData "1" --> "1" Config
    Config "1" --> "1" AwsAuthConfig
    Config "1" --> "1" TlsClientConfig
```

## Diagram 3

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[Helm Values] --> B[Cluster Array]
    B --> C1[Cluster 1]
    B --> C2[Cluster 2]
    B --> C3[Cluster N]
    C1 --> S1[Secret 1]
    C2 --> S2[Secret 2]
    C3 --> S3[Secret N]
    A --> R[Role ARN]
    R --> S1
    R --> S2
    R --> S3
    A --> E[Environment]
    E --> S1
    E --> S2
    E --> S3
    S1 --> K[Kubernetes API]
    S2 --> K
    S3 --> K
    K --> AC[ArgoCD]
```
